name: Pilot Travel Center (Roland)
description: Pilot travel center at the first I-40 exit inside Oklahoma near the Arkansas line at Fort Smith, serving the Roland/Sallisaw gateway.

name: Sallisaw Travel Center
description: Independent travel center directly off I-40 Exit 308 in Sallisaw offering fuel and driver services.

name: Love's Travel Stop #255

name: Flying J Travel Center #702
description: Flying J travel center at the I-40/US-69 junction (Exit 264-B) in Checotah with truck fueling lanes and a CAT scale.

name: Kwik-N-EZ Auto/Truck Travel Plaza
description: Independent auto/truck travel plaza off I-40 Exit 265 in Checotah.

name: R & R Truck Stop
description: Independent truck stop at I-40 Exit 237 (US-75) in Henryetta with fuel and truck parking.

name: Love's Travel Stop #274
description: Love's travel stop at I-40 Exit 221 in Okemah with diesel lanes, showers and food.

name: FireLake Grand Travel Plaza

description: Oklahoma weigh/inspection station on I-40 in the Webbers Falls area where officers perform paperwork and vehicle inspections.

name: Love's Travel Stop #737
description: A 24-hour Love's travel stop just off I-40 at the Radio Road exit in El Reno with truck parking, fuel, showers and a store.

name: Flying J Travel Center #703

name: Goodyear Commercial Tire & Service Center #255 - OKC
description: A Goodyear commercial truck tire and service center at the Morgan Road (Exit 140) I-40 cluster offering truck tire sales, repair and 24-hour roadside service.

name: Oklahoma I-40 Weigh Station (El Reno)
description: State weigh/inspection stations operated on eastbound and westbound I-40 in the El Reno area of Canadian County.
